name: Solo Dev Suite
description: Complete solo developer lifecycle toolkit — 13 skills and 2 plugins covering idea validation, scoping, architecture, building, shipping, growing, and sustaining software products.

plugins.name: solo-dev-suite
plugins.description: Master orchestrator — routes requests to the right child skill based on your project phase and intent. Manages shared project profiles across all skills.

plugins.name: mvp-scope-guardian
plugins.description: Sorts features into 4 buckets (launch-blocking, post-launch, parking lot, won't build) with effort/impact scoring and scope creep detection.

plugins.name: saas-pricing-architect
plugins.description: Designs versioned SaaS pricing with tiers, value metrics, competitive anchoring, and Stripe wiring hints.

plugins.name: adr-generator
plugins.description: Generates and maintains Architecture Decision Records in Michael Nygard format with status lifecycle and supersession tracking.

plugins.name: integration-mapper
plugins.description: Maps third-party service dependencies with 3D risk rating (blast radius, pricing exposure, deprecation risk) and fallback plans.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: Pre-ship security pass with 10-category stack-aware checklist, accepted-risk rationale, and sign-off gating on criticals and highs.

plugins.name: sprint-planner
plugins.description: Converts backlogs into realistic solo-dev sprints with capacity math, velocity tracking, and launch countdown.

plugins.name: tech-debt-register
plugins.description: Logs, categorizes, and prioritizes tech debt across 9 categories with impact/effort/urgency scoring and pay-down recommendations.

plugins.name: testing-strategy
plugins.description: Generates right-sized, stack-aware testing strategies with effort splits, CI gates, and review cadence.

plugins.name: launch-readiness
plugins.description: Pre-ship gate with 9-category tailored checklist gated on blocker resolution. Dynamically tailors by project type and business model.

plugins.name: auto-docs
plugins.description: Generates and maintains project documentation (README, SETUP, ARCHITECTURE, CHANGELOG) from profile and sibling sidecars. Preserved regions survive regeneration.

plugins.name: design-loop
plugins.description: Iterative UI/UX design feedback loop for frontend development with screenshot-driven review cycles.

plugins.name: feature-enhance
plugins.description: Scans a codebase, inventories its stack, identifies incomplete work, and uses web research to surface prioritized feature enhancements from comparable products.

plugins.name: market-feasibility
plugins.description: Takes a software product idea and produces a comprehensive feasibility study covering technical, economic, legal, operational, scheduling, and market viability — plus full pricing and go-to-market strategy.

plugins.name: software-valuation
plugins.description: Analyzes software products and generates comprehensive pricing, monetization, and go-to-market strategy reports.
